articles.summary: 提出KVpop方法，通过预测性在线剪枝压缩KV缓存，解决自回归解码中缓存线性增长问题，相比静态启发式方法更准确追踪未来token效用，实现高效鲁棒的缓存压缩。

articles.title: Do All Visual Tokens Matter Equally? Object-Evidence Preserving Token Merging for Vision-Language Retrieval
articles.excerpt: Multi-vector vision-language retrieval preserves fine-grained visual evidence through maximum-similarity late interaction, but dense image-side tokens make storage and scoring expensive. articles.summary: 针对多向量视觉语言检索中图像token密集导致成本高的问题，提出保留对象证据的token合并方法，在压缩token的同时保留区域级关键视觉信息，降低开销而不损失检索精度。

articles.title: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models

articles.summary: 面向扩散语言模型的后训练，提出dOPSD在策略自蒸馏方法，克服监督微调的离策略偏差和暴露偏差，通过迭代自蒸馏提升推理能力，实现高质量并行文本生成。

articles.title: Multiplayer Interactive World Models with Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: We introduce the first multiplayer world model for highly dynamic environments governed by complex physical interactions. articles.title: EdgeBench: Unveiling Scaling Laws of Learning from Real-World Environments
articles.excerpt: Pretraining scaling laws reveal that model capability improves predictably with data and compute. But learning from real world environments after deployment remains far less understood. articles.summary: 分析约38000小时真实世界任务中的代理交互数据，揭示从真实环境学习的缩放定律，发现模型能力随数据和计算量可预测提升，为现实部署后的持续学习提供经验基准。

articles.title: Securing the AI Agent: A Unified Framework for Multi-Layer Agent Red Teaming
articles.excerpt: The fast growth of open-source AI infrastructure, from model serving engines and agent platforms to the Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystem and the language models themselves, has outpaced the security tooling available to defend it. We present AI-Infra-Guard, an open-source framework that organi
articles.summary: 针对AI基础设施安全工具滞后的问题，提出AI-Infra-Guard开源框架，统一组织多层代理红队测试，覆盖模型服务、代理平台、MCP生态等，提升防御能力。

articles.title: Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas
articles.excerpt: LLMs are increasingly used to brainstorm research ideas, but existing evaluations mostly judge individual ideas by novelty, feasibility, or expert preference. articles.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
articles.excerpt: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. articles.summary: 将验证作为新缩放轴，提出LLM-as-a-Verifier通用框架，通过训练验证器判断解决方案正确性，与预训练、后训练、测试时计算互补，增强LLM输出的可靠性。

articles.summary: 针对长文档问答中的多模态归因问题，提出MultAttnAttrib无训练方法，利用注意力机制将生成答案归因到文本和图像证据，提升可信度与安全性，无需额外训练。

articles.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
